issues.description: Cites 'OpenStax Calculus Volume One, sections three-point-six through three-point-eight' and 'Khan Academy AP Calculus AB, Unit Three' as study resources. These external resource names/section numbers are not in the reference, which lists no third-party materials.
issues.fix: verify (external resource list; outside reference scope, not an AP CED claim)

issues.description: States module covers 'FUN three-point-one through three-point-six.' Reference confirms FUN 3.1 through FUN 3.6 exist; consistent. No issue with the topic codes; flagged only as a checkable mapping that the reference fully supports.

notes: All AP-specific claims (Unit 3 title, FUN 3.1-3.6 topics, chain-rule/implicit/inverse-trig content, and the two named exam traps about forgetting the chain rule and arcsin vs reciprocal notation) match the reference; only the external OpenStax/Khan resource citations fall outside the reference and warrant verification — no exam-weight %, dates, or researcher names were stated that contradict the reference.
